question: What is the position of the tank in relation to the people walking in the street? Select from the following options: (A) The people are behind the tank.. (B) Cannot be determined.. (C) The people are walking alongside the tank.. (D) The people are in front of the tank..
gold_answer: The people are walking alongside the tank
answer_choices: The people are behind the tank
The people are walking alongside the tank
The people are in front of the tank

qwen_prompt_object.inpaint_prompt: A large crowd of people walking away from the tank, with the tank positioned behind them.
qwen_prompt_object.negative_prompt: People standing in front of or alongside the tank, or any indication the tank is ahead of the crowd.

inpaint_prompt_used: A large crowd of people walking away from the tank, with the tank positioned behind them.
negative_prompt_used: People standing in front of or alongside the tank, or any indication the tank is ahead of the crowd.
